message:
feat(ensemble): add ModeCode, ModeTier, and category-letter taxonomy (bd-3806s)

- Add ModeTier type (core/advanced/experimental) for UX visibility filtering
- Add Code field to ReasoningMode for taxonomy codes (A1, B3, etc.)
- Add CategoryLetter() mapping categories to letters A-L
- Add CategoryFromLetter() reverse lookup
- Add ValidateModeCode() with format and category-consistency checks
- Update ModeCatalog: byCode index, duplicate code rejection
- Add GetModeByCode(), ListByTier(), ListDefault() catalog methods
- Add comprehensive tests for all new functionality
- Implement AccountRotator and mode-to-agent assignment strategies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
